steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content: The function is $g(x)=-x+10$. To find $g(0)$, replace $x$ with $0$ and keep the negative sign attached to the input.

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content: The substitution gives $$ g(0)=-(0)+10 $$ Since $-(0)=0$, this becomes $$ g(0)=0+10=10 $$ The answer is D.
